name: Corn Bread Taco Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Prepare a 2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray; set aside.
3. To prepare filling, combine ground turkey, bell peppers, and onions in a skillet. Cook until the turkey is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
4. Add taco seasoning mix, water, frozen corn, and tomato sauce to the skillet. Stir well.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared casserole dish.
6. Meanwhile, prepare the topping by making corn muffin mix according to package directions.
7. Spoon the corn muffin batter around the edge of the turkey mixture.
8. Bake, uncovered, for 20 minutes or until the corn bread is done.
